question_text: Let 𝑋 and 𝑌 be two random variables such that the moment generating function of 𝑋 is 𝑀(𝑡) and the moment generating function of 𝑌 is 𝐻(𝑡) = ൬3 4 𝑒ଶ௧+ 1 4൰𝑀(𝑡), where 𝑡 ∈(−ℎ, ℎ), ℎ> 0. If the mean and the variance of 𝑋 are ଶ and ସ , respectively, then the variance of 𝑌 (in integer) is equal to _______
